news.title:
Wipro completed a block trade of ~4,014,739 shares at Rs. 197.4.
The trade's total value was Rs. 79.3 crores on NSE platform.
news.summary:

news.title:
Nifty 50 enters technical correction, down 10.1% from Jan 5 peak of 26,373.2 to 23,697 on Mar 9.
Wipro falls 26%, Jio Financial Services 24%, Asian Paints 23%. ONGC rises 16%, Bharat Electronics gains 9%.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 enters technical correction, down 10.1% from Jan 5 peak of 26,373.2 to 23,697 on Mar 9.
Wipro falls 26%, Jio Financial Services 24%, Asian Paints 23%. ONGC rises 16%, Bharat Electronics gains 9%.

news.title:
Nifty opens below 24,700; Sensex drops 550 points.
Wipro and Dr. Reddy's remain key stocks in focus.
news.summary:

news.title:
Jio Finance invests ₹147.45 crore in Allianz Jio Reinsurance JV, with funds for operations.
TCS plans more AI data centres; Wipro appoints Laura Miller; Bajaj Auto loan repaid.
news.summary:
Jio Finance invests ₹147.45 crore in Allianz Jio Reinsurance JV, with funds for operations.
TCS plans more AI data centres; Wipro appoints Laura Miller; Bajaj Auto loan repaid.

news.title:
Wipro appoints Laura Marie Miller to its board for a five-year term from April 1, 2026, subject to shareholder approval.
Wipro reappoints Deepak Satwalekar as independent director; reports Q3 net profit of ₹3,119 crore, down 4% QoQ, shares up 0.17% at ₹195.8.
news.summary:
Wipro appoints Laura Marie Miller to its board for a five-year term from April 1, 2026, subject to shareholder approval.
Wipro reappoints Deepak Satwalekar as independent director; reports Q3 net profit of ₹3,119 crore, down 4% QoQ, shares up 0.17% at ₹195.8.

news.title:
Wipro shares hit 52-week low, falling 1.2% to ₹196.14, amid losing a $500M Estée Lauder contract to Accenture.
The contract loss highlights rivalry in IT services, challenges for Wipro's growth, and investor concerns over execution.
news.summary:
Wipro shares hit 52-week low, falling 1.2% to ₹196.14, amid losing a $500M Estée Lauder contract to Accenture.
The contract loss highlights rivalry in IT services, challenges for Wipro's growth, and investor concerns over execution.

news.title: Wipro may lose up to $100M as Accenture secures Estee Lauder's business.
news.summary: Wipro may lose up to $100M as Accenture secures Estee Lauder's business.

news.title:
Indian IT exports face risks as Gulf war escalates; $10B from West Asia.
West Asia is a fast-growing market for Indian IT, growing at 6% annually.
news.summary:
Indian IT exports face risks as Gulf war escalates; $10B from West Asia.

news.title: Wipro shares drop below ₹200 per share for the first time in Nov 2023.
news.summary: Wipro shares drop below ₹200 per share for the first time in Nov 2023.

news.title: CLSA lowers Wipro's target price from Rs 231 to Rs 218, retaining Hold rating.
news.summary: CLSA lowers Wipro's target price from Rs 231 to Rs 218, retaining Hold rating.

news.title:
CLSA cuts price targets for 8 IT stocks, including Infosys, TCS, and Wipro, citing downside risks.
Despite cuts, CLSA remains optimistic, preferring Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Persistent Systems, and Coforge.
news.summary:
CLSA cuts price targets for 8 IT stocks, including Infosys, TCS, and Wipro, citing downside risks.
Despite cuts, CLSA remains optimistic, preferring Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Persistent Systems, and Coforge.

news.title:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.
news.summary:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.

news.title:
TCS, Infosys, and Wipro face contract cancellations as AI disrupts India's IT export model, per Citrini Research.
AI-driven cost reductions threaten IT services revenue, risking rupee depreciation and macroeconomic instability.
news.summary:
TCS, Infosys, and Wipro face contract cancellations as AI disrupts India's IT export model, per Citrini Research.
AI-driven cost reductions threaten IT services revenue, risking rupee depreciation and macroeconomic instability.

news.title:
Nifty IT index faces six-week losing streak, longest since May 2022, driven by AI concerns and EPAM's guidance cut.
Infosys, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra lead losses; midcap IT stocks hit harder due to perceived AI vulnerabilities.
news.summary:
Nifty IT index faces six-week losing streak, longest since May 2022, driven by AI concerns and EPAM's guidance cut.
Infosys, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra lead losses; midcap IT stocks hit harder due to perceived AI vulnerabilities.

news.title:
Indian IT industry faces Rs 5.7 lakh crore wipeout; Nifty IT index falls 19% in 8 sessions.
Investors question if this is capitulation or the start of a deeper reckoning.
news.summary:
Indian IT industry faces Rs 5.7 lakh crore wipeout; Nifty IT index falls 19% in 8 sessions.
Investors question if this is capitulation or the start of a deeper reckoning.

news.title:
Infosys and Wipro shares may drop up to 10%, mirroring ADRs.
AI advancements, like Anthropic's product, raise concerns over IT firms' profitability.
news.summary:

news.title:

High US job data dashed hopes for rate cuts, raising costs in IT's key US market.
news.summary:

news.title:
Moody's reports US visa fee hike may cost Indian IT firms $100-250M.
Strong financials and healthy margins of firms like TCS, Infosys, HCL, Wipro could cushion impact.
news.summary:

news.title:
Wipro completed its investment in AMPIN Energy C I One Pvt Ltd on Feb 9, 2026.
The investment formalizes Wipro's equity subscription, updating strategic investment progress.
news.summary:

news.title:
Wipro shares dropped 27% in the past year, underperforming the 7% market return, despite improved EPS.
Wipro's total shareholder return, including dividends, was -24%. Long-term holders saw a 2% annual gain over 5 years.
news.summary:
